basic_details.job_title: EdCIL Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: EdCIL India Consultant (Legal) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of EdCIL India. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the EdCIL Consultant (Legal) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 31 March 2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: LLB degree with minimum 60% marks from a recognized college/university, At least three years of work experience in legal field
qualification.details: Consultant (Legal): LLB degree (with minimum 60% marks) from a college/university recognized by Government of India. Candidates having 05 years integrated LLB course are also eligible. At least three years of work experience in legal field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the EdCIL Consultant (Legal) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of EdCIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the EdCIL Consultant (Legal) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the EdCIL Consultant (Legal) positions is 22 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Legal) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Consultant (Legal) post in EdCIL India's latest recruitment drive. This offers a good number of opportunities for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (Legal) role?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must possess an LLB degree with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized university. Those with a 5-year integrated LLB course are also encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum work experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Applicants must have at least three years of relevant work experience in the legal field to be considered for the Consultant (Legal) position. This experience is crucial for the role.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Consultant (Legal) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Consultant (Legal) position is 35 years as of 31 March 2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Legal) position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Consultant (Legal) role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000 per month. This is a competitive remuneration package for the contract position.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant (Legal) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant (Legal) positions will involve a Written Test, followed by a Group Discussion, and finally an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in all stages.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Consultant (Legal) position is contract-based. While it's an opportunity with EdCIL India, it is not a permanent government job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download the PDF for detailed information before applying.
